'''''Skywalker''''' was the name given to an [[Acclamator-class transgalactic military assault ship/Legends|''Acclamator''-class assault ship]] after its capture by the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]].

==History==
The ''Acclamator''-class assault ship later known as ''Skywalker'' served the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. It was used approximately eight months after the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]] to transport [[Jabiimi Loyalists|Jabiimi Loyalist]] [[Prisoner/Legends|prisoners]] to [[Kalist VI/Legends|Kalist VI]], where they were used as [[Slavery/Legends|slave]] labor. It remained docked there until it was seized by [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] during a [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] [[Battle of Kalist VI|mission]] to free captured Rebel mathematician [[Jorin Sol]] which resulted in the liberation of the slaves. Skywalker and the slaves captured the ship and took off covered by [[Wedge Antilles/Legends|Wedge Antilles]] and the members of [[Red Squadron (Rebel Alliance)/Legends|Red Squadron]]. The ship was immediately dubbed ''Skywalker'', after its captor, in comm transmissions. Skywalker returned ''Skywalker'' to the [[Alliance Fleet/Legends|Alliance Fleet]] with the slaves, Sol, and several members of the infiltration team aboard.<ref name="The Wrong Side of the War">''[[Star Wars: Empire: The Wrong Side of the War]]''</ref>
